queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with loan purposes for the purchase of used cars and their risk-mitigating effects on credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers related to critical account statuses or existing credit obligations and their influence on reducing default likelihood.
